sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import '../styles/About.css'; const About = () => { const teamMembers = [ { name: 'Dr. Sarah Johnson', role: 'Founder & CEO', bio: 'Wildlife biologist with 15+ years of experience in conservation.', image: '/team1.jpg' }, { name: 'James Mwangi', role: 'Field Operations Director', bio: 'Local conservation expert with deep community connections.', image: '/team2.jpg' }, { name: 'Amina Hassan', role: 'Education Coordinator', bio: 'Passionate about wildlife education and community engagement.', image: '/team3.jpg' } ]; const impactStats = [ { number: '500+', label: 'Wildlife Protected' }, { number: '10,000+', label: 'Hectares Preserved' }, { number: '5,000+', label: 'Students Educated' }, { number: '50+', label: 'Communities Engaged' } ]; return (

About CareAfrica

Protecting Africa's Wildlife Through Education and Conservation

Our Mission

Protection

Safeguarding endangered species and their habitats

Community

Empowering local communities through education

Sustainability

Promoting sustainable conservation practices

Our Impact

{impactStats.map((stat, index) => (

{stat.number}

{stat.label}

))}

Our Team

{teamMembers.map((member, index) => (

{member.name}

{member.role}

{member.bio}

))}

Support Our Mission

One-Time Donation

Make an immediate impact with a single contribution

Monthly Support

Sustain our work with regular monthly donations

Corporate Partnership

Partner with us for long-term conservation impact

Join Our Mission

Together, we can make a difference in wildlife conservation

); }; export default About;
